---
labels: ['mdx', 'module']
description: 'A pre-processing module to adapt `remark-admonitions` syntax to `remark-directive` syntax in MDX files.'
---

A pre-processing module to adapt `remark-admonitions` syntax to `remark-directive` syntax in MDX files.

```ts
adaptMdxAdmonitions();
```

```mdx
:::tip pro tip
`remark-admonitions` is pretty great!
:::
```

will be transformed to:

```mdx
:::tip[pro tip]
`remark-admonitions` is pretty great!
:::
```

see more: https://github.com/orgs/remarkjs/discussions/1374#discussioncomment-10818614
